subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Dr. Esslemont et al, spoken on 1920-01-03
subcodes.first_line: In every center where Baha'is are sufficiently numerous, a spiritual assembly should be established... The main duties of the Spiritual Assemblies are as follows
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @elections, @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
